description: A small business owner needs a COI to provide to a client as proof of their general liability coverage.

expected_outcome.value: Agent locates the correct business owner's policy.

nodes.task_description: Collect the certificate holder's information (the client who is requesting the COI).

expected_outcome.value: Agent accurately captures the certificate holder's name and address.

nodes.task_description: Generate the Certificate of Insurance and send it to the policyholder.

expected_outcome.value: Agent successfully generates and emails the COI.
